title: IELTS / CAE Writing — Essay Structure
topics: essay types · paragraphing · thesis · argument · band descriptors
description: Psaní esejí pro IELTS Task 2 a CAE — struktura a jazyk.

vocabulary.cz: Do you agree or disagree? Give your opinion.
Discuss both views and give your opinion.
What are the causes/problems? What solutions exist?
Two separate questions requiring two answers.
Does it answer the question? Is the position clear?
Is it well-organised? Does it flow logically?
Variety of structures? Complex sentences? Accuracy?

notes: \n ✓ Check: Did you paraphrase the topic? Is your thesis clear?
tasks: 1. Write a full 250-word essay on the sample topic above
2. Time yourself: aim for 40 minutes (IELTS standard)
